'''鈭歴h-dh-f''' ('''shadhafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anear|anear]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anear|anear]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-dh-f
|-
! Lemma
| shadhafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadhafithi|shadhafithi]] || [[word:shadhafiji|shadhafiji]] || [[word:shadhafishi|shadhafishi]] || [[word:shadhafi|shadhafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shadhafuthuth|shadhafuthuth]] || [[word:shadhafujuj|shadhafujuj]] || [[word:shadhafushush|shadhafushush]] || [[word:shadhaf|shadhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shadhafuthu|shadhafuthu]] || [[word:shadhafuju|shadhafuju]] || [[word:shadhafushu|shadhafushu]] || [[word:shadhafu|shadhafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadhafufuth|shadhafufuth]] || [[word:shadhafufuj|shadhafufuj]] || [[word:shadhafufush|shadhafufush]] || [[word:shadhafuf|shadhafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadhafethe|shadhafethe]] || [[word:shadhafeje|shadhafeje]] || [[word:shadhafeshe|shadhafeshe]] || [[word:shadhafe|shadhafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shadhafothoth|shadhafothoth]] || [[word:shadhafojoj|shadhafojoj]] || [[word:shadhafoshosh|shadhafoshosh]] || [[word:shadhaf|shadhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shadhafotho|shadhafotho]] || [[word:shadhafojo|shadhafojo]] || [[word:shadhafosho|shadhafosho]] || [[word:shadhafo|shadhafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadhafofoth|shadhafofoth]] || [[word:shadhafofoj|shadhafofoj]] || [[word:shadhafofosh|shadhafofosh]] || [[word:shadhafof|shadhafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadhaf忙th忙|shadhaf忙th忙]] || [[word:shadhaf忙j忙|shadhaf忙j忙]] || [[word:shadhaf忙sh忙|shadhaf忙sh忙]] || [[word:shadhaf忙|shadhaf忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shadhafathath|shadhafathath]] || [[word:shadhafajaj|shadhafajaj]] || [[word:shadhafashash|shadhafashash]] || [[word:shadhaf|shadhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shadhafatha|shadhafatha]] || [[word:shadhafaja|shadhafaja]] || [[word:shadhafasha|shadhafasha]] || [[word:shadhafa|shadhafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadhafafath|shadhafafath]] || [[word:shadhafafaj|shadhafafaj]] || [[word:shadhafafash|shadhafafash]] || [[word:shadhafaf|shadhafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shadhafasha|shadhafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhafasha|goshadhafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhafasha|gokishadhafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhafn眉sha|shadhafn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhafnkn眉sha|goshadhafnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhafn眉sha|gokishadhafn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhafsh毛sha|shadhafsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhafnksh毛sha|goshadhafnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhafsh毛sha|gokishadhafsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhafrosha|shadhafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhafnkrosha|goshadhafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhafrosha|gokishadhafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhafmusha|shadhafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhafnkmusha|goshadhafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhafmusha|gokishadhafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhafsherasha|shadhafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhafnksherasha|goshadhafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhafsherasha|gokishadhafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhafngasha|shadhafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhafnkngasha|goshadhafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhafngasha|gokishadhafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhafyasha|shadhafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhafnkyasha|goshadhafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhafyasha|gokishadhafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhafyamasha|shadhafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhafnkyamasha|goshadhafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhafyamasha|gokishadhafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhafn眉sh毛sha|shadhafn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhafnkn眉sh毛sha|goshadhafnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhafn眉sh毛sha|gokishadhafn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhafn眉rosha|shadhafn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhafnkn眉rosha|goshadhafnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhafn眉rosha|gokishadhafn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhafn眉musha|shadhafn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhafnkn眉musha|goshadhafnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhafn眉musha|gokishadhafn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhafsh毛n眉sha|shadhafsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhafnksh毛n眉sha|goshadhafnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhafsh毛n眉sha|gokishadhafsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhafsh毛rosha|shadhafsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhafnksh毛rosha|goshadhafnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhafsh毛rosha|gokishadhafsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhafsh毛musha|shadhafsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhafnksh毛musha|goshadhafnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhafsh毛musha|gokishadhafsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhafron眉sha|shadhafron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhafnkron眉sha|goshadhafnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhafron眉sha|gokishadhafron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhafrosh毛sha|shadhafrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhafnkrosh毛sha|goshadhafnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhafrosh毛sha|gokishadhafrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhafromusha|shadhafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhafnkromusha|goshadhafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhafromusha|gokishadhafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhafmun眉sha|shadhafmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhafnkmun眉sha|goshadhafnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhafmun眉sha|gokishadhafmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhafmush毛sha|shadhafmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhafnkmush毛sha|goshadhafnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhafmush毛sha|gokishadhafmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhafmurosha|shadhafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhafnkmurosha|goshadhafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhafmurosha|gokishadhafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shadhaf|shadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙dh忙f|sh忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshadhaf|hoshadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙dh忙f|hosh忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshadhaf|hohoshadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙dh忙f|hohosh忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shadhaf|n眉shadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙dh忙f|n眉sh忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shadhaf|n眉n眉shadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙dh忙f|n眉n眉sh忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shadhaf|n茂shadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙dh忙f|n茂sh忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shadhaf|n茂n茂shadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙dh忙f|n茂n茂sh忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushadhaf|lushadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙dh忙f|lush忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushadhaf|lulushadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙dh忙f|lulush忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishadhaf|lishadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙dh忙f|lish忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishadhaf|lilishadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙dh忙f|lilish忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshadhaf|koshadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙dh忙f|kosh忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshadhaf|kokoshadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙dh忙f|kokosh忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshadhaf|keshadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙dh忙f|kesh忙dh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshadhaf|kekeshadhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙dh忙f|kekesh忙dh忙f]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
